title: Tendring: Integrated recycling, waste collection and street cleansing contract (EPP0103)
description: Tendring District Council procured a long-term integrated contract covering recycling and waste collections plus street cleansing across the district, including seasonal seafront and town-centre cleansing. The procurement was run as a competitive dialogue and later published as a contract award notice.
statusRationale: The contract award has been published, but service outcomes depend on mobilisation and ongoing delivery across the district over the contract term.
locationDescription: Tendring District, Essex (including coastal towns such as Clacton, Frinton, Walton, Brightlingsea, Harwich and Manningtree, plus rural areas)
locationSource: Find a Tender (Tendring District Council, EPP0103 notices 2024/S 000-033463 and 2025/S 000-086189)

evidence.title: EPP0103 Integrated Recycling, Waste Collection and Street Cleansing Contract (contract notice)
evidence.summary: Contract notice for an integrated waste and recycling collection plus street cleansing contract across Tendring District, describing scope including household collections, commercial services, and cleansing in seafront and town-centre areas.

evidence.title: EPP0103 Integrated Recycling, Waste Collection and Street Cleansing Contract (contract award notice, 2025/S 000-086189)
evidence.summary: Contract award notice linked from the original EPP0103 contract notice, evidencing award publication and conclusion of the procurement for Tendring’s integrated waste/recycling and street cleansing contract.

title: Blackburn with Darwen: highway verges and council-owned land grass cutting and weed control
description: Blackburn with Darwen Borough Council published a contract award notice for a borough-wide grass cutting and weed control contract covering highway verges and council-owned land, supporting routine maintenance of transport corridors and public realm.
statusRationale: A contract award notice has been published and the contract period begins in 2024, indicating the maintenance contract is in delivery.
locationDescription: Borough-wide (highway verges and council-owned land), Blackburn with Darwen
locationSource: Find a Tender (Blackburn with Darwen Borough Council contract award notice 2024/S 000-023520)

evidence.title: Highway Verges and Council Owned Land Grass Cutting and Weed Control (contract award notice)
evidence.source: Find a Tender (Blackburn with Darwen Borough Council)
evidence.summary: Contract award notice for a borough-wide grass cutting and weed control contract covering highway verges and council-owned land in Blackburn with Darwen.

title: East Hampshire: Whitehill & Bordon transport strategy commission
description: East Hampshire District Council procured specialist support to develop the Whitehill & Bordon Transport Strategy, covering future movement, connectivity and infrastructure planning for the regeneration area.
statusRationale: A Contracts Finder notice shows the commission was awarded with contract dates in early 2024.
locationDescription: Whitehill & Bordon regeneration area, East Hampshire
locationSource: Contracts Finder (East Hampshire District Council notice cb8125ec-d94a-4d0a-acde-b4c706684f5d)

evidence.title: Place, Connectivity & Infrastructure: Whitehill and Bordon Transport Strategy (awarded contract notice)
evidence.summary: Awarded contract notice for commissioning support to develop the Whitehill and Bordon Transport Strategy (Place, Connectivity & Infrastructure).

title: Havant: Bulbeck Road multi-storey car park demolition (town-centre regeneration enabling works)
description: Havant Borough Council began demolition of the Bulbeck Road multi-storey car park in Havant town centre as an enabling step for its regeneration plans, with mitigation measures described for noise, dust, drainage and recycling of demolition materials.
statusRationale: The council states works were due to start in September 2024 and expected to complete in winter 2024; later completion status is not evidenced here.
locationDescription: Bulbeck Road multi-storey car park site, Havant town centre, Hampshire
locationSource: Havant Borough Council news post on Bulbeck Road car park demolition

evidence.title: Havant regeneration unlocked with town centre demolition (Bulbeck Road car park)
evidence.summary: Council update stating demolition of the town-centre multi-storey car park would begin on 9 September 2024 with contractor Hughes & Salvidge and was expected to complete in winter 2024, alongside mitigation measures for dust, drainage and recycling.

title: Stockton-on-Tees: Town Centre Living (preliminary market engagement)
description: Stockton-on-Tees Borough Council issued a preliminary market engagement notice for its Town Centre Living initiative, seeking early engagement with the market in relation to town-centre residential-led regeneration and delivery options.
statusRationale: The authority published a preliminary market engagement notice, indicating the project is in pre-procurement / early development stage.
locationDescription: Stockton town centre (Town Centre Living regeneration area), Stockton-on-Tees
locationSource: Find a Tender (Stockton-on-Tees Borough Council preliminary market engagement notice 2025/S 000-084935)

evidence.title: TOWN CENTRE LIVING (preliminary market engagement notice)
evidence.summary: Preliminary market engagement notice for Stockton-on-Tees Borough Council’s Town Centre Living initiative, signalling early engagement with suppliers/developers ahead of any formal procurement.

title: Bedford: electric vehicle charging infrastructure concession
description: Bedford Borough Council progressed plans to expand public electric vehicle charging across the borough, publishing a Find a Tender concession notice for the supply of EV charging infrastructure and associated services over a long-term period.
statusRationale: A concession tender notice has been published; delivery depends on procurement outcome and rollout implementation.
locationDescription: Bedford Borough (public EV charging locations to be supplied and installed across the borough)
locationSource: Find a Tender (Bedford Borough Council concession notice 2025/S 000-006045) and Bedford Borough Council news

evidence.title: The Supply of Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure and Associated Services 2025-2040 (concession notice)
evidence.summary: Concession notice for the supply of EV charging infrastructure and associated services for Bedford Borough Council over a long-term delivery period.

evidence.title: Bedford Borough Council to install more electric vehicle charge points
evidence.summary: Council announcement on plans to install additional EV charge points across the borough, supporting a wider rollout of public charging infrastructure.

title: Cannock Chase: overflow contractor to address housing repairs and maintenance backlog
description: Cannock Chase District Council published a contract details notice for an overflow contractor to support delivery of repairs and maintenance works, intended to help clear a backlog of works orders and support ongoing housing/civic estate maintenance.
statusRationale: A contract details notice sets out an awarded contract period ending 31 March 2026 (which is in the past relative to 3 April 2026).
locationDescription: Cannock Chase District (council housing repairs and maintenance works)
locationSource: Find a Tender (Cannock Chase District Council contract details notice 2025/S 000-039698)

evidence.title: Overflow Contractor (contract details notice)

evidence.summary: Contract details notice describing an overflow contractor appointed to clear a backlog of repairs and maintenance works orders for Cannock Chase District Council, including contract dates through to 31 March 2026.

title: Chichester: Selsey Coastal Scheme site investigation services (flood/coastal resilience enabling works)
description: Chichester District Council published a contract details notice appointing site investigation services for the Selsey Coastal Scheme, supporting evidence gathering and design development for coastal flood and erosion risk management works.
statusRationale: A contract details notice has been published for enabling investigations; follow-on design and construction phases depend on scheme development and approvals.
locationDescription: Selsey, West Sussex (Selsey Coastal Scheme area)
locationSource: Find a Tender (Chichester District Council contract details notice 2025/S 000-043561)

evidence.title: Site Investigation Services - Selsey Coastal Scheme (contract details notice)
evidence.summary: Contract details notice for site investigation services supporting the Selsey Coastal Scheme, an enabling step for coastal resilience and flood-risk management work.

title: Derby: Becketwell Live performance venue (practical completion and opening)
description: Derby City Council reported that the Becketwell Live performance venue reached practical completion and was handed over to the council and operators ahead of opening, representing delivery of a major city-centre regeneration and civic entertainment asset.
statusRationale: Council updates state the venue reached practical completion in February 2025 and an opening date was subsequently announced.
locationDescription: Becketwell Live, Becketwell regeneration area, Derby city centre
locationSource: Derby City Council news updates on Becketwell Live

evidence.title: Becketwell Live celebrates major milestone with practical completion ahead of Spring
evidence.summary: Council update stating Becketwell Live reached practical completion and was handed over to Derby City Council and operators ahead of opening.

evidence.title: Becketwell Live opening date announced
evidence.summary: Council announcement setting out the opening timeline for Becketwell Live following practical completion, evidencing progression from build to operation.

title: Lewisham: school minor works programme (condition surveys and professional services)

statusRationale: A contract notice has been published for surveys and professional services; delivery of the works programme depends on procurement award and subsequent project delivery.

evidence.summary: Contract notice seeking condition surveys and multi-disciplinary professional services to support Lewisham’s school minor works programme, including preparation of reports and indicative programmes of works over multiple years.
